About me

My name is Kadek Hendrawan Palgunadi, currently I am a Ph.D. student in seismology at King Abdullah University of Science and Technology. I got my bachelor degree at Institut Teknologi Bandung, majoring geophysical engineering and Master degree in Seismology in Institute de Physique du Globe Paris. I have strong knowledge in geophysics, geology, and petroleum studies. I am a loyal, quick learner, responsible, and adaptable, proven by my achievements. I have been involved in several organizations and committees. These experiences are improving my skills and analytical problem solving as well as time management skills.
